name: GPTBot Draft Delivery (append to SEO Autopilot)

parameters.responseBody:
={
  "validation_status": "{{ $('SEO Quality and Safety Validator - Code').item.json.status }}",
  "gptbot_ingestion": "success",
  "draft_id": "{{ $('Send Draft to GPTBot Admin').item.json.draft_id }}",
  "bundle_id": "{{ $('Send Draft to GPTBot Admin').item.json.bundle_id }}",
  "admin_url": "{{ $('Send Draft to GPTBot Admin').item.json.admin_url }}",
  "deduplicated": {{ $('Send Draft to GPTBot Admin').item.json.deduplicated }},
  "manual_approval_required": true,
  "ready_for_publish": false
}

meta.note: Append after `SEO Quality and Safety Validator - Code` in the GPTBot SEO Topic Hunter MVP workflow. Replace REPLACE-WITH-CREDENTIAL-ID with the actual ID of the `GPTBot Ingest Bearer` HTTP Header Auth credential. Update existing `Respond Success` to the augmented version (or wire this Respond Success to the same webhook trigger).
